title: Squirrel Picnic Table Hanging Feeder
summary: Squirrels deserve to dine in style.
description: Squirrels deserve to dine in style. Here's how to make a super simple scrap wood picnic table squirrel feeder. Mount it to a tree or a fence and enjoy watching the squirrels snack all day long. Be sure to check out my blog post for printable PDF plans with all the details!

steps.title: Make cuts
steps.body: Make all your cuts according to the cut list and sand.

steps.title: Assemble legs
steps.body: Assemble legs in a-frame design. You can use nail gun, nails, screws, anything to join.

steps.title: Connect legs
steps.body: Connect the legs with the two connector pieces. We used a nail gun.

steps.title: Stain or finish as desired
steps.body: Apply your desired finish. Since this will go outside, you will need an outdoor grade stain or sealant unless you used outdoor wood. Your choice is something like treated lumber, cedar, or to seal with an outdoor sealant. Otherwise, it will rot in the elements.

steps.title: Mount
steps.body: Drill directly through the back connector piece into your tree or fence. Select a spot that you can easily see from your window! Top with your favorite squirrel or bird treats. Expect it to take a day or two before they feel comfortable stopping by for a snack.

steps.title: Full Plans
steps.body: Visit https://www.charlestoncrafted.com/how-to-make-a-squirrel-picnic-table/ for the full FREE pdf plans.
